title: Sky Blue Velvet Ribbon, 25mm x 9m Single Face Wrapping Ribbon, Vintage Velvet Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Wreaths, Wedding, Party, Home Decor, DIY Crafts
features: Size: We offer 6 widths of velvet ribbon: 6mm, 10mm, 15mm, 20mm, 25mm, 38mm. Ribbon is wrapped around a roll and each roll is 9m long.
Material: Made of polyester, single side is velvet finish, soft and smooth texture, adds a delicate touch to crafts, gift wrap and decorations.
Easy to Use: The gift ribbon is soft to touch and flexible, easy to cut and use, not easy to deform, you can easily make beautiful bows or other decorations.
Multiple Colors Available: We offer 31 colors of velvet ribbons, the luxurious and rich colors will be a delightful and beautiful addition to crafts and packaging.

Widely Used: Great for packaging, gift boxes, bags, garlands, decorations, jewellery, photo frames, scrapbooking, invitations, table decorations, hair bands, sewing projects, belts, shoelaces and more.
Please Note: The size of the paper spools on which the ribbon is wrapped is random, but the length of the ribbon is sufficient.
description: Product Description Uiopa Single Face Velvet Ribbon for any DIY or Gifting Projects Velvet ribbon has an elegant look and soft texture in vibrant, bright colors. The soft, plush texture gives everything a luxurious vibe that will instantly enhance any project. Great for wrapping gifts, wreaths or adding embellishment to crafts. Specification: Material: Polyester Length: 9m per Roll Width: Available in 6 Widths Color: Available in 31 Colors Packaging: 1 x Velvet Ribbon Exquisite and Sturdy The velvet is soft and lush, with no fraying or uneven edges. Single-Sided Velvet The velvet finish has a beautiful, rich sheen that instantly elevates any project. Easy to Cut Each roll of velvet ribbon is 9m long and can be cut according to your needs. Note: 1. Due to manual measurement, there may be some errors in the size. 2. Due to production lot differences, colors may vary between sizes. 3. Due to the difference of different monitors, there may be slight color difference.
